code:
--- title: Sequence Diagram - Mobile Repository Initialization (Security_ZeroTrust) config: theme: base --- %% QuantumZero UML palette note: actors/external=#fff7e6/#b45309, system/component=#e0f2fe/#075985, datastore=#ecfccb/#4d7c0f, notes=#fff9c4/#d97706. Aligns diagrams to Deliverable 1 UML/DFD theme. %% Related: diagrams/class-mobile-repositories.mmd (Security_OAuth2), diagrams/class-mobile-services.mmd (Security_OAuth2) sequenceDiagram autonumber participant App as QuantumZero Mobile App participant Storage as SecureStorageService participant DidRepo as DidRepository participant CredRepo as CredentialRepository participant DB as Local SQLite (Security_ZeroTrust) App->>Storage: initialize(Security_Encryption) activate Storage Storage-->>App: ok deactivate Storage App->>DidRepo: initialize(Security_OAuth2) activate DidRepo DidRepo->>DB: Open DB
ensure dids table activate DB DB-->>DidRepo: ok deactivate DB DidRepo-->>App: ok deactivate DidRepo App->>CredRepo: initialize(Security_Encryption) activate CredRepo CredRepo->>DB: Open DB
ensure credentials table activate DB DB-->>CredRepo: ok deactivate DB CredRepo-->>App: ok deactivate CredRepo
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个序列图，描述QuantumZero移动应用在启动时如何初始化本地仓库。核心场景是Security_ZeroTrust主题下的移动端仓库初始化流程。
明白。这个初始化涉及哪些核心参与者？我看到有SecureStorageService、DidRepository和CredentialRepository，还有底层的Local SQLite对吗？
对的，就是这五个参与者。App作为发起方，依次调用Storage和两个Repository的初始化方法，最终都落到Local SQLite上。
好的，我先画出参与者顺序：从左到右是App、Storage、DidRepo、CredRepo，最右边是DB。第一步是App调用Storage的initialize方法，传入Security_Encryption参数。
Storage初始化正确。注意Storage激活后要返回ok给App，然后 deactivate。接下来是DidRepository的初始化。
已添加Storage的生命周期。现在画DidRepo：App调用initialize(Security_OAuth2)，DidRepo激活后需要打开数据库并确保dids表存在。
这里有个细节：DidRepo到DB的消息是"Open DB<br/ensure dids table"，用换行符分开两个动作。DB返回ok后，DidRepo再返回ok给App。
收到，已处理换行。DidRepo的生命周期也画完了。接下来是CredentialRepository，逻辑类似但用的是Security_Encryption对吧？
对，CredRepo也是initialize，但参数是Security_Encryption。它同样需要打开DB并确保credentials表存在。
CredRepo部分已完成。整个流程是顺序执行：Storage → DidRepo → CredRepo，每个都独立走activate/deactivate。需要检查DB的激活状态吗？
等等，DB在DidRepo和CredRepo两次调用中都要单独激活和关闭，不是持续激活的。你刚才可能画成持续激活了？
已修复。现在DB在DidRepo调用时激活→返回ok→关闭，然后CredRepo调用时重新激活→返回ok→关闭。这样对吗？
正确。最后确认一下标题："Sequence Diagram - Mobile Repository Initialization (Security_ZeroTrust)"，还有autonumber要开启。
标题和自动编号已设置。配色方案按QuantumZero UML palette：App用actors/external配色(#fff7e6)，Storage和Repositories用system/component(#e0f2fe)，DB用datastore(#ecfccb)。
配色没问题。记得在注释里标注这个图与Deliverable 1的UML/DFD主题对齐，以及关联的另外两个图：class-mobile-repositories和class-mobile-services。
关联注释已添加。完整流程检查：App依次初始化Storage(Security_Encryption)、DidRepo(Security_OAuth2)、CredRepo(Security_Encryption)，两个Repository都操作Local SQLite确保对应表存在。所有activate/deactivate配对正确。
完美，这个Security_ZeroTrust主题下的移动端仓库初始化序列图可以定稿了。流程清晰，安全层级也体现出来了。
